root.name: CACTUS AI
root.description: Android-native local AI node with OpenAI-compatible bridge.

children.name: CORE.LLM
children.description: Local LLM inference management using CactusLM SDK.

children.name: MODEL.REPOSITORY
children.description: Dynamic weight registry and local storage management.

children.name: MODEL.DOWNLOAD
children.description: Network synchronization of GGUF model weights.

children.name: MODEL.SUPPORT_VALIDATION
children.description: Validation of Requested Model against Target Device (NPU/GPU/CPU/XPU) via PCI Device ID and Numeric Unit Identifier mapping.

children.name: MODEL.INITIALIZE
children.description: VRAM allocation and model loading sequence.

children.name: BENCHMARK.SUITE
children.description: Automated performance auditing of all linguistic devices (CPU1, GPU1, etc.) against model weight compatibility.

children.name: BRIDGE.OPENAI
children.description: Local HTTP server providing OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

children.name: SERVER.STATUS
children.description: Real-time monitoring of node connection and uptime.

children.name: SERVER.DEVICE_DISCOVERY
children.description: API endpoint (/v1/internal/devices) returning validated linguistic identifiers (CPU1, GPU1) linked to specific validated hardware chips.

children.name: INTERFACE.LIVE
children.description: Neural Audio Bridge for voice-to-voice interaction.

statusDefinitions.PARTIAL: Some parts working; not fully completed or validated.
statusDefinitions.SIMULATED: No real function; mimics behavior for testing/demo.
